title: dysphania glomulifera
intro: Dysphania glomulifera, also known as Fat-hen, is a type of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Dysphania glomulifera are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Dysphania glomulifera is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health enthusiasts.
